productDisplayName: s.Oliver Men's Let Me Be Your Valentine Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionLight grey round neck t-shirt made of 82% cotton and 18% viscose, with short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on inseam of a softly ribbed neckline, graphic print with lettering on the front, and brand tab at the bottomFittingRegular Wash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wringDry inside out in shadeWarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry clean This light grey tee from s.oliver presents a clever way to ask girls out. And though it mentions a particular time on Valentine's Day, girls will find it difficult to wait for February 14th to go on a date with you! Pair this t-shirt with jeans or shorts, and look like the lovable flirt that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
